build_system: pnpm + Turbo. All packages have typecheck, build, test, lint scripts.
test_framework: Vitest with describe/it/expect. Tests co-located in __tests__/ dirs or .test.ts files.
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm install --frozen-lockfile 2. pnpm typecheck 3. pnpm build 4. pnpm test 5. pnpm lint 6. pnpm audit --audit-level=high
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode. Node.js 22. No Docker daemon needed for this task. Packages use in-memory stores (no external DB needed for tests).
contribution_requirements: All gates must pass after changes. New features need tests. No placeholder systems unless clearly marked behind feature flags.
key_patterns: Services are classes with constructor config. Zod schemas for input validation. Types in types.ts, services in services/ dir, barrel exports in index.ts. Tests use vitest with beforeEach for fresh instances. In-memory Maps for storage (no real DB).
directory_structure: packages/payments/ - payment/billing/creator-economy services. packages/moderation/ - content moderation, trust, safety. services/moderation-worker/ - BullMQ worker consuming moderation jobs.
